raw_comment:
What do you notice?
- China produces the most out of the 3 countries it shows
- India does not produce as much electricity compared to its population
- The United States has cut a lot of coal from its production methods
- China's production methods have increased substantially 
What do you wonder?
- Why does India not produce much electricity?
- Why has China's energy production increased substantially over the last 20 years while the US has stayed the same?
How does this relate to you and your community?
This relates to me because there is a lot of carbon emitted into the atmosphere when they are producing energy. This shows the percentage of the energy created by non-renewable energy sources and the progress that has been made to make more renewable energy sources.
Create a catchy headline that captures the graph’s main idea.
Power Problems
ace_sentences: China produces the most out of the 3 countries.
India does not produce as much electricity compared to its population.
The United States has cut a lot of coal from its production methods.
China's production methods have increased substantially.
I wonder why India does not produce much electricity.
I wonder why China's energy production has increased substantially over the last 20 years.
I wonder why the US has stayed the same.
A lot of carbon is emitted into the atmosphere when they are producing energy.
This shows the percentage of the energy created by non-renewable energy sources.
This shows the progress that has been made to make more renewable energy sources.
